title: Broken Object Level Authorization
manual_validation_note: Potential object-level authorization indicators require manual validation; imported metadata alone cannot confirm BOLA.

title: Broken Authentication
manual_validation_note: Authentication declarations and JWT metadata can indicate risk, but signature and runtime enforcement are not verified in this phase.

title: Broken Object Property Level Authorization
manual_validation_note: Sensitive response fields are static exposure indicators; object-property authorization is not confirmed without runtime validation.

title: Unrestricted Resource Consumption
manual_validation_note: Rate-limit, pagination, and size indicators are documentation checks only; no stress testing is performed.

title: Broken Function Level Authorization
manual_validation_note: Privileged route indicators require manual authorization validation; no BFLA test is executed.

title: Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows
manual_validation_note: Business-flow abuse is not tested in this phase; static indicators are treated as partial at most.

title: Server Side Request Forgery
manual_validation_note: URL-like parameter indicators require manual SSRF validation; no outbound request is made.

title: Security Misconfiguration
manual_validation_note: Static configuration gaps can be observed from definitions, but deployment behavior is not tested.

title: Improper Inventory Management
manual_validation_note: Deprecated, duplicate, and undocumented inventory signals are static metadata observations.

title: Unsafe Consumption of APIs
manual_validation_note: External dependency and third-party consumption risks are only inferred from imported metadata.
